scenario_notes: baseline — healthy row with configured intent. EYE/SUB values are orthogonal settings — they don't change the state, they just modulate what watcher/importer do

importer_runs: yes (draining queue — manual Sync All OR auto-import flush of pending batch)
mgmt_actions: ×+toggles locked (visual press ok, no effect — race-prevention); LBL alive (idempotent on processed items, applies to in-flight); relink alive
scenario_notes: import in-flight. Initial index scan is silent (not Busy — scan doesn't create race). Busy triggered only by user-initiated Sync or importer flushing queue

indicator: row-level dashed visual (all glyphs go disabled per v1.2 palette)
mgmt_actions: ×+relink+LBL alive; toggles visually pressable but store-not-apply (stored intent preserved, reapplied on re-enable)
scenario_notes: row disabled by cause: (a) own × force-disable (b) parent SUB=off cascade on descendants (c) parent enabled=no cascade on subtree. All causes produce runtime-identical behavior; tooltip differentiates source

indicator: red lamp + subtype-specific tooltip ("Folder not found" / "Drive offline" / "No access" / "Path error")
scenario_notes: path unreachable — supersedes enabled/busy entirely. Subtype affects UI message + retry strategy (strategy parked as design debt). Permission-denied is not really "missing" semantically but behaves same for now
Premiere recovery block / import stuck / external impairment. Global state above row model — surfaced at panel level, not per-row. v1.1+
